name: Cushman & Wakefield CRE Data API
what_it_does: Cushman & Wakefield data platform APIs for commercial real estate market intelligence and property analytics. Enables AI agents to manage CRE market vacancy and absorption data retrieval for market trend analysis, handle property asking rent and effective rent data access for leasing analytics, access transaction and comparable sale data for CRE investment analysis, retrieve submarket and metro area market statistics for portfolio benchmarking, manage property listing and availability data for leasing and tenant representation, handle construction pipeline and new supply data for market forecasting, access CRE capital markets and investment sales transaction data, retrieve office, industrial, retail, and multifamily sector-specific metrics, manage tenant movement and lease expiration data for demand intelligence, and integrate CRE market data with investment management, leasing, and portfolio analytics platforms.
use_cases: Analyzing CRE market trends from portfolio strategy agents
Retrieving comparable transactions from investment analysis agents
Tracking market vacancy from leasing strategy agents
Monitoring construction pipeline from market forecasting agents
not_for: Residential real estate without commercial property market focus
International markets without Cushman & Wakefield data coverage
Simple property search without institutional CRE analytics depth
best_when: An institutional CRE investor, REIT, or corporate real estate team wants AI agents to automate market trend analysis, comparable transaction research, leasing analytics, and portfolio benchmarking using Cushman & Wakefield market data.
avoid_when: LICENSING RISK: CRE market data is proprietary research — redistribution without authorization violates data licensing. Market data used for investment decisions requires appropriate data licensing disclosure. Property valuations derived from market data require MAI-certified appraisal for lending and financial reporting purposes.

auth.notes: Cushman & Wakefield data API uses OAuth 2.0 and API key. Per-client credentials. Data platform primarily for enterprise clients and partners. No webhooks — batch data delivery. REST API with JSON. Chicago, Illinois HQ. Public (CWK NYSE). CRE services firm with proprietary market data. Limited public API vs. CoStar which has formal API program.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — client relationship required for data access
pricing.paid_tiers: Data licensing as part of broader advisory/services engagement; standalone data licensing available
pricing.notes: Chicago, Illinois. Founded 1917. Public (CWK NYSE). $10B+ annual revenue. Global CRE services firm. CRE market data as part of research and advisory services. Market data API for institutional clients. Competes with CBRE and JLL for CRE services market, CoStar for CRE data market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; client-negotiated access

known_agent_gotchas: LICENSING RISK: CRE market data redistribution requires explicit licensing authorization; do not redistribute Cushman & Wakefield data in downstream products without review
Relationship-gated access — API access is typically tied to an active Cushman & Wakefield client relationship; standalone data access requires separate negotiation
Data vintage — CRE market statistics are published quarterly; real-time market data is not available; validate data vintage for time-sensitive analytics
Coverage variability — market data coverage depth varies by metro and submarket; secondary and tertiary markets have less granular data than primary markets
No formal API program — Cushman & Wakefield API is less formally documented vs. CoStar; expect limited public documentation and direct relationship for support
Research methodology — CRE statistics (vacancy, absorption) methodology differs by data provider; Cushman & Wakefield, CoStar, and JLL statistics may not be directly comparable
agent_readiness.security_notes: CRE market data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Commercial real estate market and property data.

security_score_components.security_notes: CRE market data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Property market data.
